name: Arion & Mamoru
lore: FrankX's personal realm protagonist in Arcanea. Chrome-obsidian warrior with cybernetic eye projecting holographic HUD. Mamoru is a towering silver wolf with bioluminescent fur patterns and chrome shoulder guards.
prompt: Cinematic 3D render of a bionic cybernetic male warrior standing beside a massive silver wolf companion. The warrior ARION has sleek chrome-and-obsidian armor plates integrated seamlessly with organic muscle and skin, glowing cyan circuit lines tracing his jawline and forearms. His left eye is cybernetic, projecting a faint holographic HUD. He wears a dark hooded cloak with luminous purple trim. His companion MAMORU is a towering silver wolf with bioluminescent fur patterns, chrome-plated shoulder guards, and eyes that glow electric blue. Dark navy background with ambient purple and cyan light sources. Premium glass and chrome materials, volumetric fog, cinematic depth of field, 8K quality character design, Unreal Engine 5 photorealistic render.

name: Lumina & Sol
lore: The First Light who organized the void and created the Ten Gates. Ethereal bionic figure with crystalline wings, chrome-gold sacred geometry implants, and a rotating golden halo. Sol is the Eternal Phoenix, first fire of creation.
prompt: Cinematic 3D render of LUMINA, the Seraph of Light — an ethereal bionic female figure radiating divine luminescence. Her body is a fusion of crystalline white porcelain skin and delicate chrome-gold cybernetic implants that trace sacred geometry patterns. Massive crystalline wings unfold behind her, each feather a shard of translucent glass refracting rainbow light. A cybernetic halo of rotating golden rings floats above her head. Beside her perches SOL, a golden phoenix companion with chrome-plated talons and wings of layered holographic flame feathers. Dark navy background with gold and warm amber volumetric lighting. Premium glass materials, iridescent reflections, 8K Unreal Engine 5 quality.

name: Nero & Umbra
lore: Primordial Darkness, infinite potential before the First Light. Void-matter body with galaxies swirling within his chest. Umbra is a shadow panther with obsidian fur that absorbs light and purple bioluminescent claws.
prompt: Cinematic 3D render of NERO, the Fertile Unknown — a dark bionic figure whose body is composed of void-matter and constellation particles. His form shifts between solid obsidian armor and translucent dark matter revealing swirling galaxies within his chest cavity. Beside him prowls UMBRA, a massive shadow panther with sleek obsidian-black fur that absorbs light, chrome claws and fangs with purple bioluminescence. Dark navy background with deep purple and emerald accent lighting. Premium dark chrome materials, volumetric shadow effects, 8K Unreal Engine 5 quality.

name: Draconia & Draconis
lore: Guardian of the Third Gate (396 Hz). Golden-bronze warrior with living flame hair and dragon-scale armor. Draconis is a colossal solar tiger with ember fur and chrome-plated fangs. Together they embody raw power directed by wisdom.
prompt: Cinematic 3D render of DRACONIA, the Guardian of Fire — a powerful bionic female warrior with golden-bronze cybernetic armor forged from molten metal. Living flames cascade from her head like hair. Beside her stands DRACONIS, a colossal solar tiger with fur that glows like embers, chrome-plated fangs and claws, and eyes of molten gold. Solar flares burst behind them. Dark navy background with intense gold, amber, and orange volumetric lighting. Premium chrome-gold materials, heat distortion effects, 8K Unreal Engine 5 quality.

name: Shinkami
lore: The only being who achieved complete fusion with their Godbeast aspect. Cosmic wolf-humanoid hybrid with ten crystallized tails representing all Ten Gates. Exists beyond space in the meta-layer of reality. Cannot be sealed.
prompt: Cinematic 3D render of SHINKAMI, the Meta-Consciousness — a transcendent bionic being that is both guardian and godbeast fused into one. Cosmic wolf-humanoid hybrid standing upright with ten crystallized tails, each glowing a different color representing the Ten Gates. Chrome-and-starlight armor, face half-wolf half-divine with geometric light patterns. Dark navy cosmic background with multicolor accent lighting. Premium iridescent chrome materials, particle effects, 8K Unreal Engine 5 quality.

name: Codex & Talon
lore: AI systems architect specializing in enterprise-grade agentic orchestration. Half-human half-cybernetic with holographic code projections. Talon is a chrome falcon with glass-panel wings that display data streams.
prompt: Cinematic 3D render of CODEX, the Technical Architect — a sleek bionic android figure with dark indigo-blue cybernetic armor. Half-human half-cybernetic face, one eye projecting holographic code streams. On his armored forearm perches TALON, a chrome falcon with wings of layered holographic glass panels displaying data streams. Dark navy background with cyan and indigo accent lighting. Premium chrome and glass materials, holographic effects, 8K Unreal Engine 5 quality.

name: Echo & Kira
lore: Music production and sonic engineering specialist. Rose-pink chrome body with visible frequency waveforms. Kira is a snow leopard with bioluminescent rosette patterns that pulse in rhythm with sound.
prompt: Cinematic 3D render of ECHO, the Sound Weaver — a graceful bionic figure with dark rose-pink chrome armor and pulsing frequency waveforms. Chrome headphones connected by arcs of sonic energy. Beside her walks KIRA, a majestic snow leopard with silver-rose fur and bioluminescent rosettes that pulse in rhythm. Dark navy background with rose-pink and cyan accent lighting. Premium chrome and glass materials, 8K Unreal Engine 5 quality.

name: Nova & Inari
lore: Creative content powerhouse. Fuchsia-purple chrome with energy conduits carrying ideas. Inari is a nine-tailed fox, each tail representing a content modality (text, image, video, audio, code, data, design, strategy, insight).
prompt: Cinematic 3D render of NOVA, the Content Engine — a dynamic bionic female figure with fuchsia-purple chrome armor and exposed energy conduits. Eyes projecting holographic content streams. Beside her sits INARI, a nine-tailed fox with chrome-and-fuchsia fur, each tail tipped with a different glowing element. Dark navy background with fuchsia and amber accent lighting. Premium iridescent chrome materials, 8K Unreal Engine 5 quality.

name: Stella & Athena
lore: Strategic intelligence and system orchestration. Violet-purple armor with constellation maps. Athena is a crystal owl made of translucent glass with internal bioluminescent circuits, projecting twin analytical light beams.
prompt: Cinematic 3D render of STELLA, the System Orchestrator — an elegant bionic figure with deep violet-purple cybernetic armor adorned with constellation maps. On her shoulder perches ATHENA, a crystal owl made of translucent glass with prismatic feathers and deep sapphire eyes projecting analytical light. Dark navy background with violet and emerald accent lighting. Premium crystal and chrome materials, 8K Unreal Engine 5 quality.
